scenario: 正例：图文描述同一事件
text: A flood caused evacuations in Shanghai in 2024.
image_context: A flood caused evacuations in Shanghai in 2024.
demo_point: 用于先展示系统正常输出：字段一致、整体判为 Non-OOC。

scenario: 地点错配：同类抗议事件但地点不同
text: A large protest erupted in Paris on Monday after a new climate policy.
image_context: People gathered in London during a climate demonstration on Monday.
demo_point: 适合讲 location 字段：事件类型和时间相近，但 Paris/London 冲突。

scenario: 时间错配：同一地点同类事件但时间不同
text: A protest took place in Paris in 2024.
image_context: People gathered for a protest in Paris on Monday.
demo_point: 适合讲 temporal 字段：地点和事件类型一致，但时间表达冲突。

scenario: 主体错配：人物不同但地点时间动作一致
text: Barack Obama will meet officials in Beijing in 2024.
image_context: Elon Musk will meet officials in Beijing in 2024.
demo_point: 适合讲 entity 字段：Beijing/2024/meet 一致，但 Barack Obama 与 Elon Musk 冲突。

scenario: 事件类型错配：地点时间一致但新闻类型不同
text: A covid hospital opened in Paris in 2024.
image_context: A football match took place in Paris in 2024.
demo_point: 适合讲 event_type 字段：Paris/2024 一致，但 health 与 sports 冲突。

scenario: 关系/动作错配：主体地点时间一致但动作不同
text: Soldiers attacked a convoy in Ukraine in 2024.
image_context: Soldiers will meet a convoy in Ukraine in 2024.
demo_point: 适合讲 relation 字段：主体、地点、时间、事件域一致，但 attacked/meet 动作冲突。

text: A fire broke out in New York on Monday.
image_context: A football match took place in London in 2019.
demo_point: 适合压轴展示：地点、时间、事件类型同时冲突，系统仍输出主错配类型和冲突字段列表。

scenario: 证据不足：没有图像上下文
text: A fire broke out in New York in 2024.
demo_point: 用于说明系统不会在证据不足时硬判，符合“证据约束”的创新点。

scenario: 中文地点错配：中文输入可演示
demo_point: 用于展示系统支持中文关键词和中文地点字段抽取。

text: stock market rose in New York in 2024.
image_context: stock market traders worked in New York in 2024.
demo_point: 展示不是所有语义不完全相同都判 OOC；关键事件字段一致时可判 Non-OOC。
